reviews.name: Jeannine Emery
reviews.text: Amazing facial experience at Polished Skin in Eugene. The atmosphere was clean and relaxing. Analisa is the owner and esthetician — she's very knowledgeable and takes the time to understand my skin concerns before starting. The facial was designed specifically for my skin, and it left me feeling amazingly clean, fresh, and hydrated. I will definitely be back.

reviews.name: Margie Van Dorn
reviews.text: Annie is amazing! My skin looks and feels like it did in my 20's and I'm approaching 60! She's hilarious and makes the time spent with her enjoyable. I would give her more stars if I could.

reviews.name: Rachel Sullivan
reviews.text: Absolutely the most relaxed facial experience I have ever received. Annie did the Deluxe Glo2Facial on me and I have never seen or felt my skin so smooth and radiant. I'm getting married this Saturday and this was the perfect facial beforehand. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.name: Wendy Westcott
reviews.text: Before I met Annie, I hadn't ever had a facial, and I'm 54! Annie is an expert, and her experience shows. I started slow with a basic facial and graduated to more advanced treatments. She even does eyebrow waxing! I highly recommend Annie for older clients looking to keep their skin healthy.

reviews.name: Keah Taylor
reviews.text: Annie is wonderful. My skin already looks and feels so much better. At 55 I didn't think there was much I could do without plastic surgery. She's showing me there are so many other options and reasonably priced products that really make a difference. Very knowledgeable and an overall positive person.

reviews.name: Annaliesa Mehler
reviews.text: Annie is a wonderful person to work with. For nearly two years she took great care of my skin for a fair price and recommended sound products. She's very professional and only recommends what's necessary and beneficial — she has the client's interest at heart. 11/10 for her practice!

reviews.name: Emily Keene
reviews.text: Analisa is awesome! Very knowledgeable and friendly. I always leave feeling like my skin is glowing. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Cris Diaz
reviews.text: This was my first facial ever! Very happy with the experience. I will definitely be returning — my skin feels so hydrated. Thank you Analisa!

reviews.name: Sonia Castaneda
reviews.text: Always provides great quality service! I love the facials and wax treatments. Definitely recommend her!

reviews.name: Kari Linton
reviews.text: Annie is the best! Professional, clean, quick, and funny. Makes you comfortable and she isn't pushy!

reviews.name: Lauren Winder Hoar
reviews.text: Annie always does a great job on my skin! Love the products she uses too.

reviews.name: Alexis Alatorre
reviews.text: Such an amazing facial! Very relaxing and my skin felt so good after.
